name: The Apartment

params.message: A minimalist painting of a bare tree in winter. The frame is solid — purely decorative.
A matching tree painting in light tones. Signed 'L.M. 2019'.
A cream-colored sofa with patterned cushions. Nothing hidden here.
A wooden desk with a single drawer. The drawer is empty.
A sleek black swivel chair. Nothing hidden on or under it.
An ornate area rug with warm brown and gold patterns. Nothing underneath.
Floating shelves with books and decorative objects. Nothing immediately useful.
The soil here is loose and crumbly. Something is partially buried...
You pull a small brass key from the soil!
A metal lockbox behind the glass. It has a digital keypad lock.
The cabinet doors are open. You can see a drawer inside.
The drawer slides open revealing a folded paper inside.
You take the paper. It has four letters in bold: T A K I. 'password?' is written underneath.
Click! The key fits. The lower cabinet unlocks.
A wooden cabinet. The lower section is locked with a keyhole. Through the glass above you can see a metal lockbox.
The screen displays the number: 1886. Maybe it's a code for something?
A password prompt on the screen. You don't know the password yet.
You take the keycard from the lockbox!
A card reader with a red LED. You need a keycard to open the door.
The handle won't turn — the door is locked electronically.
You swipe the keycard. BEEP! The light turns green. The lock clicks open. Freedom!
The front door has a card reader. You need a keycard to open it.

items.name: Small Key
items.description: A small brass key found in the plant pot.

items.name: Paper (TAKI)
items.description: A folded paper with four letters: T A K I. 'password?' written underneath.

items.name: Keycard
items.description: A white keycard with a magnetic strip. Should work on the door.

params.message: Password accepted! The screen unlocks...
Incorrect password. Look more carefully at the paper...
Click! The lockbox springs open!
Wrong code. Think about what the laptop showed.

hints: Look carefully at the plant pot — the soil seems disturbed.
Dig in the soil to find a key. Use it on the lower cabinet.
The paper from the cabinet has the laptop password: TAKI.
The laptop shows 1886. Use that on the lockbox in the upper cabinet.
Swipe the keycard from the lockbox on the door's card reader.

params.message: You wake up in a stranger's apartment. The front door has a card reader lock. Find a way to get a keycard and escape!
